##RRUFFID=R120018
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=K_3_Cu^2+^_20_Al_3_Si_29_O_76_(OH)_16_·8H_2_O
##LOCALITY=New Cornelia mine, Ajo, Arizona, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ron Gibbs
##DESCRIPTION=Bed of pale greenish-blue bladed crystals associated with green conichalcite R120017
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120018
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 13.6317 b: 13.666 c: 14.507 alpha: 110.7687 beta: 107.2033 gamma: 105.546 volume: 2193.44 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
